overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian harbor and shipyard. The character moves from a waterfront promenade past docked vessels and through a bustling market area with NPCs, livestock, and construction materials under bright midday sun.

events.description: eagle lands on character's left arm and perches there

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone waterfront path with weapons on back

entered.detail: wide stone blocks forming a riverside walkway
stacks of cut timber piled along the path edge
calm water with lily pads floating near the shore
traditional Egyptian houses with flat roofs across the water
tall date palms lining the distant riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit stone waterfront path with the Nile river on the right and palm trees lining the distant shore. An eagle lands on the character's arm around the 10-second mark, perching briefly before the segment ends.

events.description: eagle takes flight from character's arm
large wooden crane ship comes into full view on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront passing large docked vessels

entered.detail: wooden vessel with tall cargo crane structure and furled sails
cylindrical defensive tower with scaffolding
weathered wooden pilings and platforms along the water

segments.scene_description: The eagle departs as the character continues along the dock, revealing a large wooden vessel with a cargo crane. The path curves slightly showing more of the harbor infrastructure and distant mountains shifting to the left of the frame.

events.description: turns right away from the water into a more populated dock area
passes close by an NPC standing near a building wall

agents.ego_description: turning inland and walking through a populated dock area with workers

notable_agents.action: shirtless dock worker standing near a building wall

entered.detail: large ochre-colored storage building with small windows
wide stone steps leading up to a higher level
tattered cloth canopy providing shade over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns right away from the water into a narrower dockside path lined with mud brick buildings and piles of wooden logs. A dock worker stands near the wall as the character passes closely by.

events.description: chickens scatter as character enters market area

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and walking through a small market courtyard

entered.detail: worn limestone steps leading up from the dock level
wooden structure displaying goods and fabrics
several brown chickens pecking at the ground
large bundles of woven rugs stacked vertically

segments.scene_description: The character ascends worn stone stairs into a sunlit market courtyard where chickens roam freely among stalls displaying fabrics and carpets. A merchant sits near the goods as the character passes through the busy area.

scene_state.functional_zone: active shipyard with wooden vessels under construction

events.description: enters shipyard area with wooden vessels and construction materials
passes by large wooden ship hull under construction

agents.ego_description: walking through the shipyard examining the wooden vessels and materials

notable_agents.action: worker carrying materials near wooden planks

entered.detail: partially constructed vessel with exposed ribs and planking
wooden framework surrounding vessels under repair
stacks of lumber and shipbuilding materials
tall stone pillars from ancient ruins in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bustling shipyard with wooden vessels in various stages of construction. The character walks past piles of lumber and scaffolding while workers move about the sandy ground, with ancient columns visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipyard with ancient ruins and columns

events.description: horse and rider pass by in the distance
large white canvas sails or tarps visible on the ground

agents.ego_description: continuing through the shipyard toward the ancient columns

notable_agents.action: riding a horse across the shipyard in the distance

entered.detail: large sheets of white fabric covering materials on the ground
weathered stone walls and broken columns
large monumental entrance structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues deeper into the shipyard where large white canvas sheets cover materials on the ground. In the distance, a horse and rider move past ancient stone ruins and columns that mark the edge of the harbor area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a serene riverfront promenade into the industrial heart of a bustling ancient shipyard. It begins along a sunlit stone path beside the Nile, where an eagle briefly perches on the character's arm before taking flight as the camera reveals a large wooden vessel and distant mountains. The scene then shifts away from the water, winding through a narrow dockside path lined with mud-brick buildings and piles of logs before ascending stone stairs into a vibrant market courtyard filled with roaming chickens and fabric stalls. This path opens further into a sprawling shipyard where the character moves past scaffolding and lumber, passing workers on the sandy ground. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the construction area past large white canvas sheets, ending with a view of a horse and rider moving against a backdrop of ancient stone ruins and columns.
